fields.narrative_intro: *An overdressed person and a gobsmacked person discuss the UCF commencement booing on a Zoom call where nobody can hear you.*
fields.panel1:
[setup]
OVERDRESSED PERSON: "Great news — I'm keynoting UCF Arts and Humanities!"
[Visual: Overdressed person in a blazer, beaming, slides deck visible on screen: 'AI: THE NEXT INDUSTRIAL REVOLUTION']
fields.panel2:
[build]
OVERDRESSED PERSON: "I'll open with 'AI is the next industrial revolution.'"
GOBSMACKED PERSON: "To the humanities graduates specifically?"
fields.panel3:
[pivot]
OVERDRESSED PERSON: "Okay, I struck a chord. May I finish?"
[Visual: The Zoom call shows a caption: 'AUDIENCE: AI SUCKS' scrolling in the chat.]
fields.panel4:
[silent reaction]
[Visual: Gobsmacked person's jaw has fully unhinged. Overdressed person stares blankly at the camera. The Zoom participant count ticks from 847 to 0.]
fields.panel5:
[punch]
GOBSMACKED PERSON: "You asked 800 English majors to celebrate their replacement."
OVERDRESSED PERSON: "The slide had a very nice font."
fields.panel6:
[button]
[Visual: Overdressed person's LinkedIn notification reads: 'Gloria Caulfield, Tavistock Group, has endorsed you for Public Speaking.' The gobsmacked person has left the call.]

narrative_summary: An overdressed corporate Zoom speaker barrels into her 'AI is the industrial revolution' pitch to a crowd of humanities graduates and is obliterated by boos, with her gobsmacked colleague realizing too late that the audience was exactly the people AI is replacing.
rationale: Candidate 3 earns the highest specificity by naming UCF, the Tavistock Group, and the real quote ('May I finish?'), and its closing beat — 'The slide had a very nice font' — is the only punchline that reframes the speaker's obliviousness with a fresh, character-specific detail rather than restating the obvious. The LinkedIn endorsement button also adds a second earned laugh without punching down.
story_title: Students boo commencement speaker after she calls AI next industrial revolution
place: on a Zoom call where nobody can hear you
hat_pair: hard hat with a tiny disco ball glued to the top
full-face motorcycle helmet with googly eyes stuck on
